title: Rustins Woodworm Killer 250ml
description: From the manufacturer Rustins Woodworm Killer Rustins Woodworm Killer is a low odour, deep penetrating treatment. It treats and eradicates and prevents reinfestation. It gives long last protection. Re-coat surface whilst wet. Suitable for interior use. • Treats and eradicates • Prevents reinfestation • Deep penetration • Long lasting protection • Low odour • Re-coat whilst wet • For interior use Available in 250ml and 500ml About Us In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London.
